item.title: Phone Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Phone Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Phone Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Professional www.repairmemorycard.com website offers best solution to find and rescue erased images from mobile phone memory in few mouse clicks. Useful Mobile Phone Repair Software regains all lost photos due to hardware failure from cell phone device in simplified manner. Advanced cell phone recovery utility enables user to retrieve accidentally erased digital pictures video films saved in mobile phones in cost-effective manner. Simple to use recovery software for mobile phone to get back corrupted audio video clips digital images from cell phone memory quickly. Automatic recovery tool for cell phone has user-friendly interface to get back missing files during transforming data from mobile phone memory to PC or laptop in an accurate manner. Windows based cell phone recovery application restores erased jpg, gif digital pictures due to virus attack in mobile phone memory card in real time. Quality and affordable phone recovery program saves valuable data from bad sector of cell phone memory card in few minutes. Enhanced recovery program for cell phone restores corrupted pictures videos due to improper mobile phone usages in simple steps.Feature* Professional mobile phone recovery program provides standard recovery searches to restore lost images videos from cell phone in few mouse clicks.* New cell phone recovery program restores data erased due to command line deletion from mobile phone memory card in quick time.* Windows based recovery software for cell phone repairs all lost images from formatted mobile phone memory card in less time.* Cost-effective mobile phone recovery software is reliable and flexible to get back data lost due to virus attack in phone memory successfully.* Advanced mobile phone recovery application retrieves important photos videos from bad sector of phone memory in minimal time.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendsmssoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Software for BlackBerry
(Chat & Messenging)
Professionally designed group messages broadcasting tool does not require any special hardware device or sms gateway to transmit unlimited job alerts using phone connected with PC. Powerful and reliable BlackBerry Bulk SMS Program facilitates users to create and deliver unlimited sms from pc to list of contact numbers. Comprehensive bulk sms deliver program supports Unicode language to broadcast emergency meeting details to all employees and business partners via sms messaging process.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:

It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Rounded screen corners [Qt Tools]
item.itunes:title: Rounded screen corners [Qt Tools]
item.itunes:author: piotrintes
item.itunes:summary:
Rounded screen corners
(Qt Tools)
This is a simple app that will add rounded screen corners to your desktop. It was designed to work with KDE, but might work on other DEs as well.
INSTALLING:
- install Qt 5.12.4 or newer (if you are using KDE, skip this step)
- unpack to any directory you wish
- add activate.sh to automatic startup

RUNNING MANUALLY:
- run activate.sh

For best experience it is recommended to set some windows rules:

SETUP #1 (simpler, without corners overlapping panels):
- Go to systems settings/windows/windows rules
- Add new rule for application "roudedscreencorners"
- Add attributes:
-- Virtual desktops: Force, All desktops (to keep rounded corners on all desktops)
-- Always on top: Force, Yes (To make them stay above applications)
-- Accept focus: Force, No (To prevent steeling focus when you click at them)

SETUP #2 (overlapping panels):
- Do setup #1
- Add new rules for corners that should overlap panels. Corners have window titles: Left_Top, Right_Top, Left_Bottom or Right_Bottom
- For each of them add attribute Position, Force, position:
-- Left_Top: 0 X 0
-- Right_Top: - 24 X 0
-- Left_Bottom: 0 X - 24
-- Right_Bottom: - 24 X - 24
- In activate.sh script remove # from third line (script will have to be activated after panels are drown)

WAYLAND bugfix:
- In activate.sh, in lines 4-7 you need to insert QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb before each command (fixes the corners positions)
- Add additional rule to application to prevent showing the app in taskbar (removes the task bar items for the corners)
[read more]
item.description:
Rounded screen corners
(Qt Tools)
This is a simple app that will add rounded screen corners to your desktop. It was designed to work with KDE, but might work on other DEs as well.
INSTALLING:
- install Qt 5.12.4 or newer (if you are using KDE, skip this step)
- unpack to any directory you wish
- add activate.sh to automatic startup

RUNNING MANUALLY:
- run activate.sh

For best experience it is recommended to set some windows rules:

SETUP #1 (simpler, without corners overlapping panels):
- Go to systems settings/windows/windows rules
- Add new rule for application "roudedscreencorners"
- Add attributes:
-- Virtual desktops: Force, All desktops (to keep rounded corners on all desktops)
-- Always on top: Force, Yes (To make them stay above applications)
-- Accept focus: Force, No (To prevent steeling focus when you click at them)

SETUP #2 (overlapping panels):
- Do setup #1
- Add new rules for corners that should overlap panels. Corners have window titles: Left_Top, Right_Top, Left_Bottom or Right_Bottom
- For each of them add attribute Position, Force, position:
-- Left_Top: 0 X 0
-- Right_Top: - 24 X 0
-- Left_Bottom: 0 X - 24
-- Right_Bottom: - 24 X - 24
- In activate.sh script remove # from third line (script will have to be activated after panels are drown)

WAYLAND bugfix:
- In activate.sh, in lines 4-7 you need to insert QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb before each command (fixes the corners positions)
- Add additional rule to application to prevent showing the app in taskbar (removes the task bar items for the corners)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Rounded screen corners
(Qt Tools)
This is a simple app that will add rounded screen corners to your desktop. It was designed to work with KDE, but might work on other DEs as well.
INSTALLING:
- install Qt 5.12.4 or newer (if you are using KDE, skip this step)
- unpack to any directory you wish
- add activate.sh to automatic startup

RUNNING MANUALLY:
- run activate.sh

For best experience it is recommended to set some windows rules:

SETUP #1 (simpler, without corners overlapping panels):
- Go to systems settings/windows/windows rules
- Add new rule for application "roudedscreencorners"
- Add attributes:
-- Virtual desktops: Force, All desktops (to keep rounded corners on all desktops)
-- Always on top: Force, Yes (To make them stay above applications)
-- Accept focus: Force, No (To prevent steeling focus when you click at them)

SETUP #2 (overlapping panels):
- Do setup #1
- Add new rules for corners that should overlap panels. Corners have window titles: Left_Top, Right_Top, Left_Bottom or Right_Bottom
- For each of them add attribute Position, Force, position:
-- Left_Top: 0 X 0
-- Right_Top: - 24 X 0
-- Left_Bottom: 0 X - 24
-- Right_Bottom: - 24 X - 24
- In activate.sh script remove # from third line (script will have to be activated after panels are drown)

WAYLAND bugfix:
- In activate.sh, in lines 4-7 you need to insert QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb before each command (fixes the corners positions)
- Add additional rule to application to prevent showing the app in taskbar (removes the task bar items for the corners)
[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Repair Memory Card Software is easily available at www.repairmemorycard.com website to restore overall missing, deleted or lost audio, video, text document, songs and other precious item from logically corrupted digital media storage devices. Memory Card Recovery Program retrieves missing photos, pictures, snap etc from multimedia memory card in all major data loss situation. Company provides www.repairmemorycard.com which offers you to download Repair Memory Card Software recover mistakenly deleted files and folder from various types of memory card. Software provides facility to saves all recovered missing data at specific location on computer for further reference.

[read more]

item.title: Setup Installation Maker Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Setup Installation Maker Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: setupmakersoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Setup Installation Maker Software
(Office Apps)
Professional setup installer builder software is complete executable (EXE) file producer software which is useful for developer of various organizations to produce single installation package for all system configuration with various Microsoft windows operating system including all available edition of Vista. Advance exe file maker program generate self extracting installation package from previously existing executable file with your define company name, product name, version, program icon, screenshot, installer section and distribution agreement (support Unicode character supported language) with text file. Installation wizard development program allow user to add various general details including destination path, desktop shortcuts, dialog, registry values and other attributes while producing exe of software. Software provides easy setup maker application and facilitate user to save created file at specified location of hard disk for future reference. No additional hardware, software, programming language, scripts and other supported files is being required to create windows installation wizard. Company provides step by step executable file generation procedure help option with both free and demo version of software.
[read more]

Setup Installation Maker Software

item.title: USB Drive Data Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Data Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Data Recovery Application
(Utilities)
www.repairmemorycard.com provides Repair USB software to get back missing video audio clips business projects documents from pen drive in minimal time. Convenient and reliable pen drive recovery application salvage all types of files lost due to virus attack in USB flash disk in real time. Browse recovery software for usb disk to retrieve erased entire files folders from memory stick in few mouse clicks. Pen drive recovery tool restores accidentally lost digital pictures mp3 songs flash files folders from thumb drive in cost-effective manner. Genuine pen drive recovery application restores data lost due to software malfunction in USB flash media successfully. Advanced usb recovery tool is capable to repair deleted picture video clips from damaged Handy drive or Jump stick successfully. Best and affordable data recovery tool for usb saves valuable data erased due to disaster strike in compact flash card in simplified manner. Recovery software for pen drive salvage corrupted and virus infected USB disk files folders in short time of duration. Genuine pen drive recovery tool is capable to get back erased flash picture documents from USB media due to human fault or hardware failure in an effective manner. Simple to use usb recovery program to retrieve important images music files collection lost from thumb drive due to improper device handling in real time.Feature*Professional pen drive recovery software is easy to use for novice to retrieve deleted files folders from thumb drive, memory stick, USB flash disk successfully.*Windows based usb recovery tool has simple GUI interface to restore virus infected or damaged file mp3 songs from pen drive in minimal time.*Advanced usb recovery software restores entire files folders deleted due to software malfunction in thumb drive or memory stick successfully.

[read more]

item.title: Professional Sim Card Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional Sim Card Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Sim Card Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
www.repairmemorycard.com offers Repair Sim Card software to get back inaccessible information from mobile phone sim card device in few mouse clicks. New sim recovery software regains accidentally erased text messages phonebook contact numbers from SIM card memory in cost-effective manner. Best and reliable sim recovery program supports major USB sim card reader hardware devices to access lost information in short time of span. Cost-effective sim recovery application saves valuable time and money to retrieve lost images text sms from mobile phone sim card device in quick time. Proficient sim card recovery program runs on latest Windows OS to get back missing data from dual sim card mobile phone in minimal time. Automatic card recovery technology restores missing data from popularly used sim cards devices even the number in subscription status or not. Browse sim card recovery tool to get back important text messages erased due to disaster strike in mobile phone sim card successfully. Expert sim card recovery application repairs logically erased text sms flash images user contact number from mobile phone SIM card in easiest and fastest manner.Feature*New SIM card recovery software requires no technical skill to access missing data text sms from mobile phone sim card in few mouse clicks.* Professional sim card recovery tool supports popularly used sim card devices even the number in subscription status or not.*Advanced sim card recovery application retrieves last dialed number and fixed dialed number details in short time of duration.* Professional SIM card recovery software is reliable, flexible and cost-effective to access erased text messages in real time.*Browse free trail SIM card recovery software to access deleted phonebook contact number even from dual sim card mobile phone easily.

[read more]
